rulings.Case Title: WARREN SAUNDERS VS. MICHAEL KRAMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 7, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, and ALEX SHVARTSMAN's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Moot, in light of ruling on the demurrer.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WARREN SAUNDERS VS. MICHAEL KRAMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 7, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs MICHAEL KRAMER, MICHAEL LUSTBADER, MARK SHVARTSMAN, and ALEX SHVARTSMAN's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege (1) that DBI is not taking any action regarding the allegedly non-compliant construction of the fence; (2) to attach a copy of the Plans and the Permit and indicate how the fence, as currently constructed, violates the permits and the Ordinances with specific references to the permit and the law; (3) to allege non-speculative damages. See to Koll-Irvine Center Property Owners Assn. v. County of Orange (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1036; and (4) to assert injunctive relief as a remedy. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK KIROVSKY VS. AMY FUJIKAWA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 7, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs AMY FUJIKAWA and AMY NAITO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. The Notice fails to comply with requirements of SFRO and is misleading as it attaches a copy of the law that was not valid and enforceable at the time of the service of the Notice. = (501/REQ)
